evals.expected_output: Runs the transcribe.py script, shows the transcript with timestamps, and offers to discuss the content. Transcript should mention 'Claude Code', 'CLI tools', 'OpenCLI', and 'browser automation'.

assertions.name: script_was_executed
assertions.description: The agent actually ran the transcribe.py script via Bash rather than just explaining how to do it

assertions.name: transcript_contains_keywords
assertions.description: The output contains key terms from the video: 'Claude Code', 'CLI', 'OpenCLI', 'browser automation'

assertions.name: follow_up_discussion_offered
assertions.description: The agent offered to discuss, research, or dive deeper into the content after showing the transcript

evals.prompt: hey i just saw this reel and want to dive deeper into the idea — can you pull what they're saying? https://www.instagram.com/reels/DWIjdfEtNbl/
evals.expected_output: Runs the transcribe.py script, shows the transcript, gives a brief summary, and proactively invites a deeper discussion about the ideas in the video.

assertions.name: script_was_executed
assertions.description: The agent actually ran the transcribe.py script via Bash

assertions.name: summary_provided
assertions.description: The agent gave a brief 1-2 sentence summary of what the video is about, not just the raw transcript

assertions.name: dive_deeper_invited
assertions.description: The agent proactively invited the user to explore the ideas further, matching the user's stated intent to 'dive deeper'

evals.prompt: what does this video say https://www.instagram.com/reels/DWIjdfEtNbl/ i want to know more about the tool mentioned
evals.expected_output: Runs the transcribe.py script, shows the transcript, identifies the tool being discussed (OpenCLI), and offers to research or discuss it further.

assertions.name: script_was_executed
assertions.description: The agent actually ran the transcribe.py script via Bash

assertions.name: tool_identified
assertions.description: The agent specifically identified 'OpenCLI' as the tool mentioned in the video

assertions.name: research_or_discussion_offered
assertions.description: The agent offered to research or discuss OpenCLI further, responding to the user's stated interest
